Live Claude usage limits on your desktop: session, weekly and per model meters with
reset countdowns, pinned beneath every other window like a sticky note.

### Highlights

* Reads your limits automatically from the local Claude Code sign in, no manual tracking
* Renews an expired sign in by itself, so it loads with live data straight from PC startup
* Sticks to the desktop layer, so apps always sit on top of it
* Dark and light themes with a coral accent, draggable and lockable
* Toast notifications at 80% and 95% of any limit
* Tiny footprint: a single small exe with zero third party packages

### Requirements

Windows 10 or 11, the [.NET 8 Desktop Runtime](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/8.0)
(Windows offers the download if it's missing), and Claude Code signed in with a claude.ai
Pro or Max subscription on the same PC.

Download `UsageWidget.exe` below and run it. Open the right click menu on the widget for
options, including Start with Windows.
